# deliberate — structured multi-phase deliberation for complex decisions

> Combinator package: orchestrates step_back, meta_prompt, triad, calibrate, rank to perform principled decision-making.

## Contents

- [Parameters](#parameters)

## Parameters {#parameters}

| key | type | required | description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `ctx.confidence_threshold` | number | optional | Calibrate threshold (default: 0.7) |
| `ctx.debate_rounds` | number | optional | Triad debate rounds per option (default: 2) |
| `ctx.max_options` | number | optional | Max options to consider (default: 4) |
| `ctx.options` | array of any | optional | Pre-defined options (auto-generated if absent); each opaque {name?, description?, strengths?, risks?} |
| `ctx.task` | string | **required** | The decision question |

fields.doc: step_back's abstractions sub-result (opaque; shape owned by step_back)
fields.name: abstractions

fields.doc: Per-option triad result {option, verdict, winner}; option is opaque (user-shaped)
fields.name: debates

fields.name: expert_consultations

fields.doc: Options actually considered (as supplied or auto-generated)
fields.name: options

fields.doc: Final recommendation built from the tournament winner
fields.name: recommendation

fields.doc: Triad winner verdict for the selected option
fields.name: debate_outcome

fields.doc: Selected option's description (nil when caller-supplied option omits it)

fields.doc: Selected option's name (nil when caller-supplied option omits name)
fields.name: name
